prompt_text:
### Demographics: 46-year-old Asian woman

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 2 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes after elevated fasting glucose on routine screening
Current symptoms: Occasional fatigue and thirst with nocturia; no DKA/HHS signs; no severe hypoglycemia

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 4 (15-29)
Heart failure: HFmrEF (NYHA Class III)
ASCVD: Coronary artery disease (History of PCI/stent); Coronary artery disease (History of CABG)
Body mass index category: Obese Class I
Recurrent Complicated Urinary Tract Infections
Chronic Obstructive Pulmonary Disease
Orthopedic fracture (healed)
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 4 (15-29); HF: HFmrEF (NYHA Class III); ASCVD: Coronary artery disease (History of PCI/stent); MASLD: Normal; BMI Category: Obese Class I
- Family history: Family history of type 2 diabetes not assessed
- Social history: Current smoker (20 cigarettes/day for 20 years; ~20 pack-years); No alcohol use

### Medication information
- Current medications: Semaglutide 1mg once weekly; Fluticasone/salmeterol Inhaler (twice daily), Rosuvastatin (10 mg daily), Losartan (50 mg daily), Finerenone (10 mg daily), Ciprofloxacin (500 mg twice daily for 7 days)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 68.7 kg; Height 162.9 cm; BMI 25.9 kg/m²; Blood pressure 123/86 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 8.1%; 9 months ago 7.7%; 6 months ago 7.2%; 3 months ago 6.9%; current 5.7%), FPG (12 months ago 221mg/dL; 9 months ago 207mg/dL; 6 months ago 190mg/dL; 3 months ago 164mg/dL; current 108mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 67.9kg; 9 months ago 66.9kg; 6 months ago 67.1kg; 3 months ago 62.7kg; current 68.7kg), Height (12 months ago 162.9cm; 9 months ago 162.9cm; 6 months ago 162.9cm; 3 months ago 162.9cm; current 162.9cm), BMI (12 months ago 26.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 25.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 25.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 24.0kg/m²; current 25.9kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 126mmHg; 9 months ago 126mmHg; 6 months ago 123mmHg; 3 months ago 127mmHg; current 123mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 86mmHg; 9 months ago 83mmHg; 6 months ago 84mmHg; 3 months ago 86mmHg; current 86mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 32U/L; 9 months ago 29U/L; 6 months ago 20U/L; 3 months ago 28U/L; current 28U/L), AST (12 months ago 19U/L; 9 months ago 23U/L; 6 months ago 23U/L; 3 months ago 22U/L; current 22U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 1.2mg/dL; 9 months ago 1.2mg/dL; 6 months ago 1.1mg/dL; 3 months ago 1.1mg/dL; current 1.1mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 28mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 28mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 26mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 27mL/min/1.73m²; current 26mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 151mg/g; 9 months ago 147mg/g; 6 months ago 194mg/g; 3 months ago 204mg/g; current 190mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 79mg/dL; 9 months ago 74mg/dL; 6 months ago 79mg/dL; 3 months ago 78mg/dL; current 76mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 36mg/dL; 9 months ago 37mg/dL; 6 months ago 36mg/dL; 3 months ago 36mg/dL; current 35mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 112mg/dL; 9 months ago 108mg/dL; 6 months ago 128mg/dL; 3 months ago 128mg/dL; current 118mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 13.0g/dL; 9 months ago 13.0g/dL; 6 months ago 13.0g/dL; 3 months ago 13.0g/dL; current 12.2g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Not measured (Current); fasting C-peptide Not measured (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Moderate adherence (estimated 70-90%); SMBG 1-3 times/week; lifestyle control inconsistent.
Financial context: Patient has comprehensive insurance with minimal out-of-pocket burden and reports no financial barriers to clinically indicated therapies (budget ≤ KRW 1,000,000/month).
